'''Ember''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Belgaroth system/Legends|Belgaroth system]], located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] of the galaxy. Illuminated by binary stars [[Matanya A]] and [[Matanya B]], Ember was a searing world with no moons.<ref name="CatCW" />

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
